verdict_reasoning: TMED10 is a p24 cargo-adaptor protein with a single-pass TM anchor that cycles exclusively through the ER-Golgi-early-endosome pathway via COPII/COPI vesicles. No documented shedding, no PM minority pool, no cell-state or tissue-restricted surface display, no lysosomal exocytosis involvement, no wash-resistant TM-partner surface anchoring. Exclusively endomembrane-resident.
